Move borde reaffirmation check before flowCompleted gate

When a product was already quoted (lastQuotedProducts exists) and user

rules, 6-persona council. Kernel/Philosophy split: every rule tagged
[K] (enforced) or [P] (advisory). Council gated to dangerous tier
and multi-file diffs only. Runtime metrics: decision_latency_ms,
diff_size_lines, rollback_rate.

commit.message:
fix: watchlist metrics showing 0% — add structured metrics-query endpoint

The watchlist hook was calling /api/v1/semantic/query (LLM pipeline) with
a structured payload it doesn't accept, causing silent Zod validation
failures. Added a dedicated /api/v1/semantic/metrics-query endpoint that
queries rm_daily_sales directly with a static slug→column allowlist.
Also batches all metrics into a single SQL query instead of N separate
requests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix tutor TTS not working on mobile devices

Mobile browsers block Audio.play() and SpeechSynthesis.speak() unless
the first call happens inside a user-gesture handler. Added
_unlockMobileAudio() which plays a silent WAV and speaks an empty
utterance when the user taps "Start Speaking" — this primes both APIs
so later async tutor feedback can play audio freely.

commit.message:
Add community guidelines gating for reviews and fix wizard already-reviewed UX

Three improvements to the review system:

1. Replace the report icon on review cards with a proper flag SVG matching the
   comment system for visual consistency.

2. Gate review submissions behind the existing community guidelines agreement
   flow (shared Profile.guidelines_agreed field). Covers all review entry points:
   review hub detail page, review hub replies, and Rate My Games wizard.
   Extracts guidelines modals into shared partials for DRY reuse across
   comments, review hub, and wizard templates.

3. Fix the Rate My Games wizard for already-reviewed games: instead of showing
   an empty interactive form that silently blocks submission, display the user's
   existing review with recommend badge and body text. Adds an "Edit Review"
   flow that pre-fills the form and uses PUT to update, with a cancel button to
   return to the display view.

Claude/code review mobile optimization v r mn n (#302)

* feat: code review, mobile optimization, test infrastructure, and App.jsx refactor

- Test infrastructure: Vitest + React Testing Library (96 tests across 10 files)
- Mobile optimization: 44px touch targets, responsive tables/charts/legends

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JggE2bVspaSursWaoY27pG

* docs: Mobile UI redesign plan inspired by MyFitnessPal

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JggE2bVspaSursWaoY27pG

* MandalaChart 모바일 최적화: 그리드/셀/버튼/피커 반응형 적용

- 3x3 그리드: gap-4 → gap-1.5/sm:3/md:4, max-w-2xl/md:6xl
- 센터/노드 셀: 패딩 p-1.5~p-4 반응형, 이모지 text-xl~5xl 스케일링
- 텍스트: text-[10px]~text-base 반응형 + line-clamp-2 오버플로우 방지
- 액션 버튼: h-7/w-7 → sm:h-9/w-9 모바일 축소
- 배지: h-4/text-[9px] → sm:h-5/text-xs 모바일 축소
- 헤더: flex-col sm:flex-row 래핑, 제목 truncate 처리
- 브레드크럼: text-xs sm:text-sm, break-words 래핑
- 컬러피커: grid-cols-4 sm:8, 이모지피커: grid-cols-6 sm:12
- 생성 폼: 색상/이모지 grid-cols-1 sm:2 스택 레이아웃
- 목표 상세: 제목 래핑, 날짜 grid-cols-1 sm:2

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JggE2bVspaSursWaoY27pG

- TemplateManager: switch card buttons to horizontal row with icon-only on mobile

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JggE2bVspaSursWaoY27pG

* feat: mobile-first UX redesign with bottom navigation bar

Major mobile UX overhaul inspired by MyFitnessPal design patterns:

1. Bottom Navigation Bar (BottomNav.jsx):
   - 5-tab fixed bottom nav: 습관, 보드, 학습, 계획, 더보기
   - Slide-up sheets for 학습 (Goals/Mandala/Weaknesses) and 더보기 (Templates/Logout)
   - Active state highlighting with blue accent color

2. Compact Mobile Header:
   - Replaces ~300px header with ~80px sticky bar on mobile
   - Child avatar + date navigation (< date >) + save button
   - Week period and theme shown in compact row 2

3. Habit Tracker Mobile Redesign:
   - Summary stats bar: 달성/전체 = 달성률% (equation style)
   - 7-day horizontal layout per habit (tap circles to cycle colors)
   - Compact color legend (one-line hint)
   - Collapsible reflection and reward sections

4. Dashboard Improvements:
   - Pill-style scrollable tabs on mobile (replaces underline tabs)
   - Dashboard header hidden on mobile (bottom nav handles it)
   - Tab bar sticks to top on mobile

5. CSS Utilities:
   - .no-scrollbar for hidden scrollbars
   - .view-enter animation for smooth view transitions
   - .safe-bottom for iOS safe area

Desktop layout completely unchanged (all changes use md:hidden/hidden md:block).

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JggE2bVspaSursWaoY27pG

* feat: 5 improvements - dashboard fix, discord timing, auto-save, planner fix

1. Dashboard stats: memoize callbacks, fix mobile layout (min-h-screen,
   footer hidden), remove dead mock functions from useDashboardData.ts

2. Discord notifications: remove per-check notifications, add weekly
   summary notification when all habits are filled. New notifyWeekSummary()
   and calculateDetailedWeekStats() in discord.js. Edge Function updated
   with week_summary embed type.

3. Auto-save: habit color changes trigger 3-second auto-save timer.
   Shows status indicator (pending/saving/saved) in mobile header.
   Uses useRef timer with cleanup on unmount.

4. Weekly Planner: fix empty calendar by removing weekId dependency.
   New getWeeklyPlanByDate() joins through weeks table by date.
   New ensureWeekExists() creates week record if needed.
   Calendar tab shows create-plan prompt when no plan exists.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Revert workfront-api merge: restore 3 separate skills + add 4 new ones

Splits the consolidated workfront-api (12 refs, 3 sub-areas) back into
3 focused skills, and adds 4 new Workfront domain skills — bringing the
total from 3 → 10 skills, all at ~4 references each.

Restored skills (renamed refs, improved descriptions, v21.0 URLs):
- workfront-tasks-api: TASK CRUD, fields, bulk ops, query patterns, custom form data
- workfront-issues-api: OPTASK CRUD, assignments, status transitions, queues, custom form data
- workfront-forms-api: Category/Parameter objects, parameterValues (all object types)

New skills:
- workfront-projects-api: Projects, Portfolios, Programs, Milestones
- workfront-events-api: Event Subscriptions / webhooks
- workfront-documents-api: Upload, versioning, folders
- workfront-approvals-api: Approval processes, decisions, routes

Cross-skill linkage: CUSTOM_FORMS.md in tasks/issues → workfront-forms-api;
PARAMETER_VALUES.md notes all-object-type scope.

commit.message:
Add 7 invariant tests for financial VibeLiquidStaking

256 runs, 128K calls each, 0 violations. Handler simulates 5 actors
performing randomized staking, unstaking, withdrawals, rewards, and
time warps. Invariants verified:

1. Solvency: total assets (ETH + VIBE at 1:1) >= all accounted pools
2. Share price: always >= 1e18 (no negative rebasing)
3. Supply consistency: actor balances <= totalSupply
4. TVL consistency: matches pool + pending + insurance
5. Insurance bounded: <= 5% of all reported rewards
6. Fee accounting: exact match between contract and handler tracking
7. Shares imply pool: supply > 0 requires pooledEther > 0

Completes Phase 2 test suite for liquid staking (75 unit + 13 fuzz + 7 invariant).

commit.message:
fix(strategy): cache key ignored prompt content — all same-type prompts got identical strategy

Root cause: strategy cache key was `make_key("strategy", task_type, complexity)`,
meaning every "coding + moderate" prompt returned the same cached strategy for
7 days. Additionally, file_contexts, url_fetched_contexts, and instructions
were never passed to the strategy stage, so attached files and user constraints
were invisible to framework selection.

Fixes:
- Cache key now includes prompt content hash + analysis signature hash
  (weaknesses + recommended_frameworks) for prompt-specific strategies
- TTL reduced from 7 days to 24 hours
- Strategy stage now receives and injects file_contexts, url_fetched_contexts,
  and instructions into the LLM prompt (strategy_prompt.py already instructs
  the LLM to consider these signals)
- Pipeline wires all three new parameters through to run_strategy()

feat: add table row/column quick-action insert buttons (#125)

* feat: add table row/column quick-action insert buttons

Shows a floating "+" button with a blue line indicator when hovering near
table row or column boundaries (Google Docs style). Clicking inserts a
new row below or column to the right at the hovered boundary.

Closes #24

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* style: softer light gray add buttons with rounded corners

Restyle table insert buttons to be softer and less visually dominant:
- Light gray background (#f8f9fa) with subtle border (#dadce0) instead
  of bold blue
- Rounded rectangle shape (4px radius) for the main insert button
- Circular style for component add buttons with shared getAddButtonStyle
- Removed heavy box-shadow in favor of clean flat design

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: show insert button on column/row instead of boundary

Instead of requiring precise hover on the border between rows/columns,
the "+" button now appears centered on the hovered row or column when
the mouse is near the left/top edge of the table. Also adds descriptive
tooltips ("Insert row below" / "Insert column to the right"), removes
the boundary line indicator, and improves table detection for margin
hover areas.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: center the + icon in table insert button using SVG

Replace raw "+" text character with an inline SVG cross icon for
pixel-perfect centering within the button.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: set width on all new cells when adding columns, not just first row

addColumnLeft/Right only set width and widthType on first-row cells
(guarded by rowIndex === 0), leaving cells in other rows with undefined
widths. This caused the layout painter to render new columns without
proper sizing, producing staircase-like visual artifacts overflowing
outside the table.
